lineage.procedure: Original pre-trained MarianMT model downloaded from HuggingFace
Fog a Mirror LoRA fine-tune (r=4, alpha=8), merged back to full weights

training.note: Fog a Mirror — minimal LoRA intended as baseline, merged to full weights. Byte-identical to base in most cases.

ct2_int8_DELETED_was_fake.note: This was a byte-identical copy of base/, NOT real INT8. Deleted 2026-04-12 by Dr. C. Replaced by lora_ct2_int8 (real INT8 of proprietary weights).

herm0.derived_from: Parallel Phase 4 improvement (2 epochs, lr=5e-6, batch=32)

examination_log.method: CT2 INT8 reexport — load broken pickle model, extract state_dict, rebuild as safetensors
examination_log.notes: Replaced broken pickle INT8 (181.6MB) with clean safetensors (278.1MB). Verified base-CT2 output match: True. Sample translation: "Helloworld". Elapsed: 24.9s.

examination_log.method: Stress test methodology correction — retroactive note on en_fallback artifact

correction.issue: All Phase 2 stress tests used English fallback input regardless of actual source language
correction.impact: 85.7 BLEU score appears on 51% of all models (noise artifact from en_fallback). HPLT high scores were false positives.
correction.resolution: Phase 2 stress test scores marked unreliable. Manual quality assessments and Tier C retests supersede automated scores.

examination_log.notes: CORRECTION: Stress test BLEU scores from H0-STREPS exam may be unreliable for non-English-source models. The stress test pipeline used English fallback input for models whose source language lacked a curated paragraph, producing an artificial 85.7 BLEU score artifact on ~51% of models. This does NOT invalidate the quality checks (non-empty, not-echo, etc.), only the BLEU numerical scores. For Tier C models, the dedicated retest with correct source language input supersedes the original stress test scores.

examination_log.method: Grand Rounds v1: 6-test composite (bloodwork, crossmatch, vitals, stress_fracture, consistency, scripture)
examination_log.notes: Grand Rounds v1 full-fleet battery. Run 2026-03-28/29, 4.9h, 2658 variants. Filed to clinic post-hoc by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-11.

examination_log.scope: read-only model inspection; write-only patient file update
examination_log.notes: Fleet inventory audit by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-11. Non-destructive: no model weights were modified, created, or deleted. Only this patient JSON file was updated. The purpose of this audit was to reconcile claimed variant presence against actual on-disk state, because between Herm Zero's Grand Rounds run (2026-03-28/29) and today, 374 of the 375 OPUS-improved models were ONNX-INT8-exported and their source safetensors were deleted, but the patient files still claimed the safetensors were 'present'. This audit updates each patient file's variant_cluster.<variant>.status to reflect what is actually on disk right now.

examination_log.method: Phase 3a — Independent re-run of Herm Zero's Grand Rounds v1 harness (same methodology, fresh execution). Targets: base variants that graded D+/D/D-/F in GR1 and still have safetensors on disk.
examination_log.notes: Independent verification of GR1 failing base model. Ran the SAME grand_rounds_harness.py that Herm Zero used, as a fresh subprocess. Original GR1 grade: D- (61.29). New grade: A+ (97.07). Agreement: mismatch. No model weights modified. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-11.

examination_log.method: 3x back-to-back re-run of grand_rounds_harness.py base variant
examination_log.notes: This patient was flagged as a 'still differs' mismatch after phase3a/phase3a_v2 re-tests. To classify, ran the harness 3 times back-to-back. All 3 runs produced IDENTICAL grade D/64.2, but this differs from GR1's D-/61.29. Classification: stable_differs_from_gr1_environmental. The harness is deterministic (same inputs always give same outputs), but something environmental changed between GR1 (2026-03-29) and today (2026-04-11) — most likely subtle numerical drift from a library/tokenizer update, a CUDA kernel path change, or a fresh download pulling slightly different Helsinki-NLP weights than what Herm Zero had. The score delta is always within one grade step and is reproducibly stable. No model modification was performed. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.method: Phase 3b — Full Fleet Dr. C Independent Certification. Ran grand_rounds_harness.py (same 6-test battery as Herm Zero's GR1) independently on every testable variant. This is Dr. C's personal certification, not a verification of GR1.
examination_log.notes: Dr. C independent certification of mkh-en. Tested 2 variant(s): base, ct2_int8. Best variant grade: D (63.87). This is a fresh, independent run — not a re-run of GR1. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-12.

examination_log.method: CTranslate2 INT8 quantization of lora/ (proprietary weights) via ct2-opus-mt-converter --quantization int8
examination_log.notes: Created REAL INT8 quantized version of the proprietary fog-of-mirror LoRA fine-tuned weights. Source: lora/model.safetensors. Output: lora-ct2-int8/model.bin. Size: 73 MB (~25% of source). The previous ct2_int8/ directory was a FAKE (byte-identical copy of base/) and has been deleted. This replacement is genuinely quantized from the proprietary variant. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.method: Grand Rounds v2 — 8-test paragraph-level stress battery with 5-star rating
examination_log.notes: Grand Rounds v2 paragraph-level stress test. 8 tests: sentences, paragraphs (5 domains), long-form (2 passages), native input, domain stress, edge cases, round-trip, speed. Non-English-source models tested with native OPUS data. Best variant: lora at 2.5★ (basic). Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.method: Parallel improvement pipeline (Phase 4): 2 epochs, lr=5e-6, batch=32, fp16, worker=2. Score 73.7→85.3 (Δ+11.6). IMPROVED — saved as herm0/
examination_log.notes: Parallel worker 2. Data: 49950 pairs. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.method: CTranslate2 INT8 quantization of herm0/ (deeply-improved proprietary weights)
examination_log.notes: Quantized herm0/model.safetensors → herm0-ct2-int8/model.bin (73 MB, ~25% of source). Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.method: Grand Rounds v2 certification of herm0 (OPUS-improved) variant
examination_log.notes: GR v2 certification of herm0 (proprietary deeply-improved) variant. Rating: 2.5★ (basic). Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

Uploaded to WindyWord HuggingFace organization. Variants published: lora, lora-ct2-int8, herm0, herm0-ct2-int8. Public repo with branded model card. Patient file attribution linked via README. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

notes: CT2 reexported from broken pickle to safetensors (25Mar26)

source2_diagnosis: LORA_SUSPICIOUS: LoRA variant nearly same size as base (delta < 1KB)
CT2_SEVERELY_DEGRADED: INT8 scores 35.0 points below base

lora_identity_check.legal_status: DISTINCT_BINARY — LoRA weights differ from base (different SHA-256)

surgical_log.procedure: Deep LoRA fine-tune attempted — did not beat base, weights discarded
